samples.xml_description:
<module id="counter_12">
    <description>Counter from 0 to 11, controlled by valid_count.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low)</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal</input>
        <input id="valid_count">Enable counting</input>
        <output id="out" width_description="[3:0]">Current count</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="STATE_IDLE" value="0x0">Idle state</enum>
        <enum id="STATE_COUNT" value="0x1">Counting state</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[0:0]">
            <description>Current state of the counter</description>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <item>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <item><signal>rst_n</signal> is 0</item>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <assign>
                        <item><signal>state</signal> to <value>0</value></item>
                    </assign>
                </action>
            </item>
            <item>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <item><signal>state</signal> is <value>0</value></item>
                        <item><signal>valid_count</signal> is 1</item>
                        <item><signal>out</signal> is 11</item>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <assign>
                        <item><signal>state</signal> to <value>1</value></item>
                    </assign>
                </action>
            </item>
            <item>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <item><signal>state</signal> is <value>1</value></item>
                        <item><signal>valid_count</signal> is 1</item>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <signal>out</signal> is 11
                        </condition>
                        <true>
                            <assign>
                                <item><signal>out</signal> to <value>0</value></item>
                            </assign>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <assign>
                                <item><signal>out</signal> to <signal>out</signal> + <value>1</value></item>
                            </assign>
                        </false>
                    </if>
                </action>
            </item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
